reach_why: Extends familiar fallibilist and Kuhnian themes, but does not clearly open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links ontology extraction, regime-bound explanation filters, and anomalous reports into one fallibilist critique.
falsifiable_why: Vulnerable to counterexamples showing stable categories and filters reliably detect error without suppressing breakthroughs.
explanation: Ontological grids and explanation standards are useful yet revisable; anomalies justify suspending certainty about basic categories.
